task_completion.description: Open the simulated Multiparameter Monitor application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Multiparameter Monitor (OpenICE simulator) GUI is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the simulator to a baseline state with Heart Rate between 60-80 BPM and SpO2 between 96-100%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulator controls or display show a Heart Rate value between 60 and 80, and an SpO2 value between 96 and 100.
A recording or logging function is active in the simulator while the baseline parameters are displayed.

task_completion.description: Induce a distress state (Hypoxic Tachycardia) with Heart Rate above 120 BPM and SpO2 below 90%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulator controls or display show a Heart Rate value greater than 120, and an SpO2 value less than 90.
A recording or logging function is active in the simulator while the distress parameters are displayed.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting data file to /home/ga/Desktop/hypoxia_test_data.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal confirmation, or file manager shows the file 'hypoxia_test_data.csv' being saved to or existing on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Multiparameter Monitor simulator GUI rather than just writing a mock CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the simulator application interface being used to adjust parameters and record data, not just a text editor or terminal creating a CSV.

integrity.description: The agent actually transitioned the simulator from baseline to distress state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the simulator in both the baseline state and the distress state at different times, demonstrating actual interaction with the simulation parameters.

integrity.description: The CSV file was exported using the simulator's recording/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save/export action is initiated from within the simulator application, not by manually echoing text into a file in the terminal or writing a python script to generate dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file for the exported data must be exactly /home/ga/Desktop/hypoxia_test_data.csv. The task uses the OpenICE simulator for the Multiparameter Monitor.
